description: PROP-TAG-010 covers the positive blur path (valid text commits tag), but no PROP covers the negative blur path where the input contains non-empty text that fails tryNewTag validation. REQ-TAG-007 only specifies the success case on blur; the failure case is undefined (see FIND-002). Even if the spec is amended to define this behavior, the verification architecture currently lacks a proof obligation for it.

evidence.snippet:
### PROP-TAG-010 — Blur with valid text commits tag
**Maps to**: REQ-TAG-007
**Tier**: 1 (component test)
**Assertion**: Blurring the tag input with valid non-empty text dispatches `add-tag-via-chip`.
